appliedUpdates.description: Build/dist consistency: code review shows source code has correct implementations but testing found failures. This suggests dist/ may not reflect latest src/ changes. Added to library: 'Always rebuild (npm run build) and restart Electron app after code changes before testing.'

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance: 'Commits should be scoped to the feature. Avoid including unrelated changes (e.g., AuthProvider removal in Kembali button fix). This helps with traceability and code review.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-kembali-button-all-forms commit b85e701 includes AuthProvider removal unrelated to the Kembali button fix.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add step to verify Electron app is running before attempting CDP connection. Include healthcheck step using 'netstat -ano | findstr ":9222.*LISTENING"' or similar.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: test-all-modules worker spent time troubleshooting Electron startup; skill doesn't reference services.yaml electron.start command.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: The skill procedure (form file investigation) was used for sidebar-collapse-persistence which is a UI state feature in App.tsx, not a form fix. Consider adding a note that the skill adapts to different types of backend/frontend fixes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-sidebar-collapse-persistence correctly implemented localStorage persistence but skill was designed for Batal button fixes.
